Andrew Qing He

何清 (He Qing)

Ph.D. Candidate in Computational Mathematics
Southern Methodist University

Deep Learning Scientific Computing Stochastic Methods PDEs
View Research

Research Interests

Developing computational methods for complex scientific problems

Machine Learning for PDEs

Developing deep neural network methods for solving partial differential equations, including DeepMartNet for boundary value problems and eigenvalue computations.

Stochastic Computing

Employing stochastic tools including Gillespie algorithms and stochastic differential equations to model system dynamics and solve challenging computational problems.

Differential Geometry

Investigating geometric frameworks including connections and Riemannian metrics to provide insights into diverse models from mechanics to machine learning optimization.

Systems Biology

Studying emergent dynamics in biological networks, including gene regulation and neuronal systems, with experience from the iGEM competition.

Publications

Selected research papers and preprints

A structure preserving numerical scheme for Fokker-Planck equations of structured neural networks with learning rules

Authors: He, Q., Hu, J., & Zhou, Z.

Journal: SIAM Journal on Scientific Computing, 44(4), B1045-B1067 (2022)

DOI
DeepMartNet: A Martingale Based Deep Neural Network Learning Method for Dirichlet BVPs and Eigenvalue Problems of Elliptic PDEs in R^d

Authors: Cai, Wei, Andrew He, and Daniel Margolis

Journal: SIAM Journal on Scientific Computing, 48(1), 2026

DOI
Learning Neural Pushforward Samplers for Distributions from Fokker-Planck Equations by Weak Adversarial Training

Authors: Andrew Qing He, and Wei Cai

Status: arXiv preprint arXiv:2509.14575 (2025), submitted to Journal of Computational Physics

arXiv

Status: arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.12869 (2026)

Weak Adversarial Neural Pushforward Method for the McKean-Vlasov / Mean-Field Fokker-Planck Equation

Neural Pushforward Samplers for the Fokker-Planck Equation on Embedded Riemannian Manifolds

arXiv

Experience & Education

Ph.D. Candidate in Mathematics

Southern Methodist University, Dedman College of Humanities and Sciences

2020 - Present

Conducting research in computational mathematics, focusing on deep learning methods for solving partial differential equations and developing stochastic computational algorithms.

Research Assistant

Beijing International Center of Mathematical Research (BICMR)

China

Contributed to research on numerical schemes for Fokker-Planck equations and structured neural networks.

iGEM Competition Participant

International Genetically Engineered Machine Competition

2019 - Team Peking

Participated in synthetic biology competition, gaining hands-on experience in systems biology and interdisciplinary research.
